summary: High‑energy Brent‑led jam highlighted, recording quality not described
review: The lone reviewer gushes over a unique Brent Mydland jam that they liken to an unheard “Only A Fool,” noting its rarity from the spring‑1984 New Haven run. No details are given about the source or clarity of the audio, so the technical side remains unclear, but the enthusiasm suggests the performance itself is a standout.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review, but it is a 5‑star enthusiastic comment focusing on a special jam; lack of recording detail keeps confidence low.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments about soundboard, audience mix, clarity or any technical issues were provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer only mentions the unique Brent jam; no broader set‑list assessment is available.

band_member_comments.Keys: Brent's improvisation is praised as a rare, high‑energy jam.
